tools.name: hilt_get_offer
tools.description: Get Hilt's canonical agent-commerce offer, interfaces, products, prices, and buying paths.

tools.name: hilt_get_catalog
tools.description: Get the canonical Hilt Pay agent-commerce catalog and discovery endpoints.

tools.name: hilt_get_pricing
tools.description: Get canonical Hilt Pay API and readiness-scan pricing.

tools.name: hilt_create_quote
tools.description: Create a deterministic quote and recommended Hilt buying path without charging the buyer.

tools.name: hilt_agent_bootstrap
tools.description: Create a free sandbox setup intent and scoped sandbox key. Live activation remains an explicit paid step.

tools.name: hilt_claim_api_key
tools.description: Recover live API-key delivery after a settled marketplace plan activation.

tools.name: hilt_readiness_scan
tools.description: Inspect one public HTTPS product URL for x402, payment clarity, receipts, entitlements, fulfilment, and operational metadata. Costs 15 USDC on Solana.

tools.name: hilt_activate_starter
tools.description: Activate 30 days of Hilt Pay API starter for 79 USDC on Solana. Requires a free Agent Bootstrap setup intent.

tools.name: hilt_activate_growth
tools.description: Activate 30 days of Hilt Pay API growth for 349 USDC on Solana. Requires a free Agent Bootstrap setup intent.

tools.name: hilt_activate_scale
tools.description: Activate 30 days of Hilt Pay API scale for 1250 USDC on Solana. Requires a free Agent Bootstrap setup intent.
